name: Game of Cards
description: Agile work-card methodology for AI-agent collaborators. Adds a `goc` tool, three lifecycle hooks, and 14 deck skills at workspace tier.
_skills_note: kickoff is omitted pending split-claude-specific-content-out-of-generic-kickoff-skill (the current goc/templates/skills/kickoff body is heavily Claude Code-specific; the host-agnostic kickoff lands in that card and gets added here).

deck_path.description: Override the per-workspace deck location. Defaults to <workspace>/.game-of-cards/deck/.

pattern_generalization_check.description: Whether the agent_end hook reminds the model to consider filing generalization cards after code-mutating turns.
